ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVlabs/GR00T-WholeBodyControl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVlabs/GR00T-WholeBodyControl
Language: c++
Welcome to GR00T Whole-Body Control (WBC)! This is a unified platform for developing and deploying advanced humanoid controllers. This includes: Decoupled WBC models used in NVIDIA Isaac-Gr00t, Gr00t N1.5 and N1.6 and GEAR-SONIC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Project-OSRM/osrm-backend
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Project-OSRM/osrm-backend
Language: c++
Open Source Routing Machine - C++ backend

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmlc/xgboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmlc/xgboost
Language: c++
Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library, for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++ and more. Runs on single machine, Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink and DataFlow

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/geo-tp/ESP32-Bus-Pirate

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-ai-edge/LiteRT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT
Language: c++
LiteRT, successor to TensorFlow Lite. is Google's On-device framework for high-performance ML & GenAI deployment on edge platforms, via efficient conversion, runtime, and optimization

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/benchmark
Language: c++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/perfetto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/perfetto
Language: c++
Production-grade client-side tracing, profiling, and analysis for complex software systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
Language: c++
Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, RK NPU, Axera NPU, Ascend NPU, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: project-chip/connectedhomeip
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/project-chip/connectedhomeip
Language: c++
Matter (formerly Project CHIP) creates more connections between more objects, simplifying development for manufacturers and increasing compatibility for consumers, guided by the Connectivity Standards Alliance.
